---
title: Tools
listing:
  id: tools
  template: ./_templates/accordion-logo.ejs.md
  contents:
    - tools/ada/index.qmd
    - tools/dataversenl/index.qmd
    - tools/dmponline/index.qmd
    - tools/ithenticate/index.qmd
    - tools/nebula/index.qmd
    - tools/osf/index.qmd
    - tools/pure/index.qmd
    - tools/qualtrics/index.qmd
    - tools/researchcloud/index.qmd
    - tools/researchdrive/index.qmd
    - tools/scicloud/index.qmd
    - tools/scistor/index.qmd
    - tools/scisure/index.qmd
    - tools/snellius/index.qmd
    - tools/vucomputehub/index.qmd
    - tools/yoda/index.qmd
  sort: false # sort as defined above
  filter-ui: [title]
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  image-align: right
  template-params:
    type: Tool
format: 
  html:
    include-in-header:  
      text: |
        <style>
        .handbook-title {
          text-align: center;
        }
        #title-block-header {
          display: none;
        }
        </style>
---

::: {.tools-main}
::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.main-title}
![](public/tools-icon.svg){width=2em}  
Tools
:::
A tool is a broad term for a software application or platform. These pages list research tools supported by VU Amsterdam, describe what they are for, how to get access and who to contact for questions and support. You will also find manuals describing how to use the tool in your workflow and links to documentation of the supplier.
:::

---

::: {#tools .py-5}
:::
:::
